description: Implement Static App Shortcuts for the QuickNotes application located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/QuickNotes. Define two shortcuts in a new resource file at app/src/main/res/xml/shortcuts.xml: 'New Note' (ID: shortcut_new_note, Action: com.example.quicknotes.CREATE_NOTE, Icon: @drawable/ic_add) and 'Search' (ID: shortcut_search, Action: com.example.quicknotes.SEARCH, Icon: @drawable/ic_search). Both shortcuts should target com.example.quicknotes.MainActivity in the com.example.quicknotes package. Register the shortcuts file in the AndroidManifest.xml by adding the appropriate meta-data to the MainActivity declaration and ensure the project builds successfully.
